display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Sean and Casey forge an alliance but when one strikes crab, will he betray it? Plus, will Wild Bill's risky new bait and fishing strategy pay off big.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh wants to investigate ghostly sightings and terrifying sounds coming from an abandoned canal along the Potomac. What will they uncover.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh concludes his investigation into the mysterious Maya city of El Mirador, including the possible burial of the Snake Kings.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: In the Pilbara region, the Ferals hit a run of nuggets that could transform their season. Meanwhile, the Gold Retrievers are rocked by a medical emergency.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: A vet and a military mum tackle the harsh conditions of Mexico's Cayo Venado. Will a week of freezing rain lead the survivalists right up to breaking point.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: A workaholic and a loner are challenged to survive three weeks in Thailand. Competing with monkeys and rats for food, will they be able to come together as a team.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: The team travel to Virginia to salvage a massive piece of stained glass from the Grace Family Church. But they run into challenges when equipment is delayed.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: The team travel to Virginia to salvage a soon-to-be renovated bowling alley. But, the bowling alley floor turns out to be far heavier than they anticipated.

programme.title: Gold Divers
programme.desc: Shawn needs a strong start to build his mega-dredge but newcomer Ken and the 600-ton Myrtle Irene may have beat him to it. Emily's plan to dive deep is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Gold Divers
programme.desc: To fund the mega-dredge, Shawn races to the Bluff where Kris is onto some of the best gold. Emily's most promising summer might suddenly be dashed on the rocks.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: A new crew are under threat from crocodiles and accusations of illegal prospecting. The Victoria Diggers receive some welcome help.

programme.title: Extinct Or Alive
programme.desc: On one of his most audacious and exciting expeditions to date, Forrest travels to the remote Galapagos Islands in search of the fabled Fernandina tortoise.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Tempers flare on the Northwestern and the future looks uncertain for the Seabrooke as the fleet prepares to begin their winter hunt for Opilio crab.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: As unrelenting winds rip across the crab grounds, the Wizard prepares to do battle with the descending polar ice pack. Meanwhile, tempers flare on board the Kodiak.

programme.title: Devil's Canyon
programme.desc: It's the final push before winter hits and season goals slip away. Pump problems for Boyce put his gold haul at risk, and Ben banks on his skills to survive.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh has a fresh lead on a shipwreck from 1715 with a potentially massive treasure haul. He launches an expedition into Florida's Atlantic coast.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates embarks on yet another mission, this time into the dark caves and thick jungles of Puerto Rico in search of the mysterious Chupacabra.

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Home Is Where The Yurt Is. In the Tennessee mountains, the Raneys construct a massive yurt. They turn a rundown pond into a food source and create a workshop with a propane forge.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Cloudy With A Chance Of Explosives. Slim Pickings' efforts to recycle precious dam water are derailed. The Blacklighters scrounge for any last opal in their Land of Promise Claim.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Sam smashes opal with a jackhammer in the Bushmen's mine. Plus, Rod and Les make a wager that will force the loser to wear one of Sam's pink shirts.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Sig heads off the grid on a daring midnight mission, hoping to shake his rivals. Plus, Keith receives big news from his doctor regarding a mystery illness.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Keith struggles to keep the Wizard afloat as a flooding collision void threatens to sink him. Plus, Jake is left stranded when a boat part goes missing.

programme.title: Cops UK: Bodycam Squad
programme.desc: An officer is spat on as he tries to arrest an angry fugitive, and a rookie cop hits the jackpot in a raid of a suspected criminal's home.

programme.title: Street Cops UK
programme.desc: Rob tries to trace the source of a dangerous new batch of drugs that's been causing a spate of overdoses in Medway. Dan chases down an aggressive drunk driver.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Poseidon Crew's mine site is swamped after a brutal storm. Ryan collapses in a deadly heatwave, while Russell and Shane uncover a big nugget.

programme.title: Pocahontas
programme.desc: This is the Disney animated tale of the romance between a young American Indian woman named Pocahontas (Irene Bedard) and Capt. John Smith (Mel Gibson), who journeyed to the New World with other settlers to begin fresh lives. Her powerful father, Chief Powhatan, disapproves of their relationship and wants her to marry a native warrior. Meanwhile, Smith's fellow Englishmen hope to rob the Native Am

programme.title: Frozen
programme.desc: When their kingdom becomes trapped in perpetual winter, fearless Anna (Kristen Bell) joins forces with mountaineer Kristoff (Jonathan Groff) and his reindeer sidekick to find Anna's sister, Snow Queen Elsa (Idina Menzel), and break her icy spell. Although their epic journey leads them to encounters with mystical trolls, a comedic snowman (Josh Gad), harsh conditions, and magic at every turn, Anna

programme.title: Frozen II
programme.desc: Elsa the Snow Queen has an extraordinary gift -- the power to create ice and snow. But no matter how happy she is to be surrounded by the people of Arendelle, Elsa finds herself strangely unsettled. After hearing a mysterious voice call out to her, Elsa travels to the enchanted forests and dark seas beyond her kingdom -- an adventure that soon turns into a journey of self-discovery.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Sit back for an epic lounge showdown. Lara Spencer tasks two teams to create bold, beautiful, and budget-friendly spaces in a Mid-Century vs. Modern Farmhouse faceoff. Unreal finds plus DIY designs mean must-see floor to ceiling lounges.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Amazing stories of people who have experienced God's blessings.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim chickens out of having a vasectomy, but Cheryl is so effusive in her praise that he is unable to admit that he did not go through with it.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl wants Jim to give up all his vices so they can try to have a baby.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl surprises Jim with a romantic evening, but it cuts into his planned TV boxing match.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim offers to give Andy an old barbecue grill, then decides Andy should pay for it.

programme.title: POOF! Bye Bye Under Eye Bags!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Accident Compensation: Get Help Now!
programme.desc: Helping injured individuals get the compensation they are owed.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Amazing stories of people who have experienced God's blessings.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Eric's desire to act lands him a role on a television show; Shawn questions whether he should remain friends with Topanga.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Topanga, who is still upset that Cory kissed another girl, dates someone else.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: After a reconciliation, Cory and Topanga pretend to be apart so Shawn can think he's the only one who can bring them back together.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Cory and Topanga end up at the same hotel as Alan and Amy on prom night.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Meet ordinary people who have experienced the extraordinary power of prayer.

programme.title: 700 Club Interactive
programme.desc: Highlighting current events and stories that will help bring encouragment to people.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Dana, Cheryl's sister and best friend, moves away, Jim realizes he must find Cheryl a new friend as soon as possible.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim's band wins a contest, providing the group an opportunity to play backup for child pop sensation Jami McFame.

programme.title: Dr. Dolittle
programme.desc: After a fender bender, Dr. John Dolittle (Eddie Murphy) gets back his childhood ability to converse with animals. But the gift turns out to be a mixed blessing when the good doctor finds himself besieged by boozing monkeys, injured owls and depressed lions who need his special assistance. When Dolittle's strange behavior catches the attention of his wife, Lisa (Kristen Wilson), he winds up in a me

programme.title: Dr. Dolittle 2
programme.desc: In Dr. Dolittle 2, the now-famous doc has more patients -- two-legged and four-legged -- than he can handle. But his animal friends want more than office visits. The outraged critters want to save their forest from unscrupulous human developers, and they're seeking Dolittle's help.

programme.title: The Pacifier
programme.desc: Elite Navy SEAL Shane Wolfe (Vin Diesel) can handle just about anything thrown his way, but even the best have their limits. When he fails to keep scientist Howard Plummer (Tate Donovan) safe from assassination, Wolfe has a shot at redemption by being assigned to protect Plummer's five children, including rebellious Zoe (Brittany Snow), Seth (Max Thieriot) and clingy Lulu (Morgan York). More than

programme.title: The Game Plan
programme.desc: Bachelor football star Joe Kingman (Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson) seems to have it all. He is wealthy and carefree, and his team is on the way to capturing a championship. Suddenly, he is tackled by some unexpected news: He has a young daughter (Madison Pettis), the result of a last fling with his ex-wife. Joe must learn to balance his personal and professional lives with the needs of his child.

programme.title: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: An unemployed actor disguises himself as an elderly nanny in order to spend more time with his estranged family.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael volunteers to be chief for Kady's Indian Princess sleepover and tries to keep Claire from sneaking out to a rave with her boyfriend.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael finally gets the house to himself when a blackout occurs.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is disheartened when he does not win the Small Businessman of the Year award.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael and Jay return home to find Jr. and his girlfriend (Meagan Good) fooling around in their bed.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: A furious Michael considers throwing Jr. out of the house after catching him in a compromising position with his girlfriend (Meagan Good).

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Janet's overzealous direction of the school play is cause for concern for Kady's kindergarten teacher.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael and Jay give their bickering kids a taste of their own medicine, making them scared they're on the brink of breaking up.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael's sister (Vivica A. Fox) visits and sparks a rivalry with Jay.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael's advice about women backfires when Jr. ends up with two dates to a dance; Jay dreams Michael is having an affair with Janet Jackson.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: When Michael inspires Jay's artistic side, she makes him pose for a nude painting that makes him the subject of everyone's jokes.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is caught by surprise when his childhood friend, Tommy, shows up for a visit in a wheelchair.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay insists that Michael attend a couples' seminar with her; Jr. and his friends try to make some extra money.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael volunteers to be chief for Kady's Indian Princess sleepover and tries to keep Claire from sneaking out to a rave with her boyfriend.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael finally gets the house to himself when a blackout occurs.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is disheartened when he does not win the Small Businessman of the Year award.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael and Jay return home to find Jr. and his girlfriend (Meagan Good) fooling around in their bed.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: A furious Michael considers throwing Jr. out of the house after catching him in a compromising position with his girlfriend (Meagan Good).

programme.title: The Beatles: In the Life
programme.desc: The Beatles took the world by storm in the 1960s and are still the best-selling band of all time with 183 million sales worldwide.

programme.title: Killing John Lennon
programme.desc: A dramatic step-by-step breakdown behind the lead up to John Lennon's murder on Dec. 8, 1980.

programme.title: Bob Dylan: Leader of the Free World
programme.desc: Explore Bob Dylan's transformative journey through music, from folk poet to cultural icon and his impact on generations; learning the timeless legacy of his lyrics, voice and ever-evolving artistry.

programme.title: Elvis: Death of the King
programme.desc: Elvis Presley's charisma and musical talent made him the king of rock, but his rock star lifestyle led to a downfall that was as swift as his rise.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Laura offers to walk a man's dog and uses the opportunity to snoop through his house; Jordan goes out with a love interest but he blacks out from heavy drinking, leaving him to put the pieces back together of what happened the night before.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Glenn strikes gold when a gorgeous man asks him on a gym date, but it deteriorates quickly as the man has serious rage issues; Hannah is charmed by a classmate's powerful performance; Jesse agrees to meet a guy from a dating app that is into kink.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Singer Ally Brooke returns home to San Antonio, where recipes come from the heart, not a measuring cup; Ally and her family talk about her tour, her album and the comforts of home.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Rapper Dave East and his parents share their favorite meal of steak and eggs; Dave talks about his father's positive influence, the importance of a strong work ethic and his role as Method Man in "Wu Tang: An American Saga.".

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Big Freedia teams with an Internet sensation.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Mr. Ghetto is arrested, jeopardizing the tour.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Big Freedia dances on cars for her newest video, risking arrest.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Big Freedia teams up with other bounce musicians for a children's song.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Big Freedia makes a bounce act for kids.

programme.title: Ruta madre
programme.desc: After he gets his heart broken, a Mexican-American singer embarks on a road trip through Mexico to reconnect with his roots.

programme.title: Go Back to China
programme.desc: A spoiled rich girl is sent to work for her family's toy business in China after she is cut off by her father for blowing through most of her trust fund.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: ASAP Ferg and his uncle T-Nice share a secret apple pie recipe, talk about his new album, and their biggest life lessons.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Saweetie, her Aunt and Grandma make gumbo, and reveal intimate family history including the origin of her name, Saweetie. Then DaniLeigh and her little sister Brianna make their family tradition, ᰠDominican Lasagnaᴠ and a tasty drink, Morir Sonando.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: G-Eazy and his mom make homemade waffles and discuss G-Eazy's Endless Summer Fund and his dream of buying her a house.

programme.title: The Beatles: In the Life
programme.desc: The Beatles took the world by storm in the 1960s and are still the best-selling band of all time with 183 million sales worldwide.

programme.title: Killing John Lennon
programme.desc: A dramatic step-by-step breakdown behind the lead up to John Lennon's murder on Dec. 8, 1980.

programme.title: The Ride Life
programme.desc: Sung explores the UK car culture, finding it's the people who make it truly unforgettable.

programme.title: The Ride Life With Sung Kang
programme.desc: Sung dives into Poland's car culture, discovering new freedoms in a thrilling experience.

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours: Elvis Presley
programme.desc: Elvis Presley's Memphis Mafia recounts the true story of his last 24 hours and death.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cosgrove and Shaw investigate the murder of a physician whose politician wife suspects she was the intended target; Price and Maroun's case hangs in the balance when the defense calls one of the doctor's young patients to testify as a witness.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A romantic date ends with a teenager fighting for her life in the hospital; Carisi can't help bringing the case home with him as he envisions the dangers ahead for his growing daughters.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cosgrove and Shaw investigate the murder of a physician whose politician wife suspects she was the intended target; Price and Maroun's case hangs in the balance when the defense calls one of the doctor's young patients to testify as a witness.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a businessman is murdered, his surprising connection to Cosgrove's daughter helps the police make a break in the case; Price and Maroun disagree on how to proceed at trial when the defendant's age brings up legal precedent they must follow.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A romantic date ends with a teenager fighting for her life in the hospital; Carisi can't help bringing the case home with him as he envisions the dangers ahead for his growing daughters.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A couple's dinner party ends with a violent home invasion and assault by masked men; Rollins suspects the crime is linked to her Intelligence investigation of an international gang of thieves.

programme.title: Love Story: John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette
programme.desc: John and Carolyn fight to keep their relationship intact; the world watches as tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Love Story: John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette
programme.desc: John and Carolyn fight to keep their relationship intact; the world watches as tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Love Story: John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette
programme.desc: John and Carolyn fight to keep their relationship intact; the world watches as tragedy strikes.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: The Gang looks back on 2020 to justify their numerous PPE loans as they contributed to the chaos of the past political year way more than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: Upon discovering that their self-made Lethal Weapon sequels have been pulled from the local library, the Gang decides to address their political incorrectness by making another film: Lethal Weapon 7.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: The Gang looks back on 2020 to justify their numerous PPE loans as they contributed to the chaos of the past political year way more than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: Upon discovering that their self-made Lethal Weapon sequels have been pulled from the local library, the Gang decides to address their political incorrectness by making another film: Lethal Weapon 7.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: Upon discovering that their self-made Lethal Weapon sequels have been pulled from the local library, the Gang decides to address their political incorrectness by making another film: Lethal Weapon 7.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex find themselves at the mercy of a dangerous crime kingpin from their past when they enlist his help on a case.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Sarah ́s former professor is allegedly framed for murder, Sarah calls Charlie and Rex to untangle the perfect crime.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead in the snow, Charlie and Rex have a pool of unconnected suspects with only one thing in common -- the victim was convinced they were all her family.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: On the third anniversary of Charlie and Rex's partnership, Charlie recounts how a high-stakes kidnapping brought the duo together on their first case.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: While on the hunt for an escaped murderer, Charlie and Rex are held hostage; when a greater threat emerges, Charlie and his captor are forced to work together if they're going to make it out alive.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A mummified body is discovered in Newfoundland ́s tundra; Charlie and Rex set off in search of a community of survivalists who may be harboring a murderer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead in the snow, Charlie and Rex have a pool of unconnected suspects with only one thing in common -- the victim was convinced they were all her family.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex

programme.desc: While on the hunt for an escaped murderer, Charlie and Rex are held hostage; when a greater threat emerges, Charlie and his captor are forced to work together if they're going to make it out alive.

programme.desc: When a businessman is murdered, his surprising connection to Cosgrove's daughter helps the police make a break in the case; Price and Maroun disagree on how to proceed at trial when the defendant's age brings up legal precedent they must follow.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a businessman is murdered, his surprising connection to Cosgrove's daughter helps the police make a break in the case; Price and Maroun disagree on how to proceed at trial when the defendant's age brings up legal precedent they must follow.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A couple's dinner party ends with a violent home invasion and assault by masked men; Rollins suspects the crime is linked to her Intelligence investigation of an international gang of thieves.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cosgrove and Shaw suspect an art dealer was murdered but can't make an arrest until they locate her body; Price and Maroun must go to trial with a circumstantial case and a suspect with unlimited resources; the squad celebrates a birthday.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Agent Clay consults with Benson when a woman is found gravely injured at a remote campground and the suspect could be anywhere along the Eastern Seaboard; Bruno and Silva take a chance on an odd hunch to see if it becomes a lead.

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
programme.desc: As the Fourth of July nears, satellite engineer David Levinson (Jeff Goldblum) investigates a 3,000-mile-wide mother ship that's approaching Earth. Fortunately, 20 years earlier, nations across the world started to use recovered extraterrestrial technology to develop an immense defense program. When the alien invaders attack with unprecedented force, the U.S. president, teams of scientists and bra

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After climatologist Jack Hall is largely ignored by U.N. officials when presenting his environmental concerns, his research proves true when a superstorm develops, setting off catastrophic natural disasters throughout the world; trying to get to his son, Sam, who is trapped in New York with his friend Laura and others, Jack and his crew must travel by foot from Philadelphia, braving the elements,

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller

programme.title: Deep Rising
programme.desc: A newly unveiled ocean liner, the Argonautica sets out on its first cruise, only to encounter dangers both on board and in the ocean depths. While the beautiful thief Trillian attempts to steal riches from the boat's wealthy passengers, the ship encounters major problems, most notably a giant murderous sea creature with tentacles. Eventually, a boat captained by John Finnegan comes across the Argo

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage. Join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Darkest Minds
programme.desc: When teens mysteriously develop powerful new abilities, they are declared a threat by the government and detained. One of the most powerful young people, Ruby, escapes from her camp and joins a group of runaways who are seeking a safe haven. Betrayed by the adults in power, this newfound family soon realizes that running is not enough -- they must use their collective powers to wage a resistance a

programme.title: Deep Rising
programme.desc: A newly unveiled ocean liner, the Argonautica sets out on its first cruise, only to encounter dangers both on board and in the ocean depths. While the beautiful thief Trillian attempts to steal riches from the boat's wealthy passengers, the ship encounters major problems, most notably a giant murderous sea creature with tentacles. Eventually, a boat captained by John Finnegan comes across the Argo

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: Klaatu, an extraterrestrial visitor to planet Earth, becomes the herald of upheaval on a global scale. As the world's governments and scientists race to understand what is happening and how to stop it, Dr. Helen Benson and her stepson come to understand the chilling ramifications behind Klaatu's statement that he is a "friend to the Earth.".

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Scientist Bruce Banner (Edward Norton) desperately seeks a cure for the gamma radiation that contaminated his cells and turned him into The Hulk. Cut off from his true love Betty Ross (Liv Tyler) and forced to hide from his nemesis, Gen. Thunderbolt Ross (William Hurt), Banner soon comes face-to-face with a new threat: a supremely powerful enemy known as The Abomination (Tim Roth).

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: When Thor's evil brother, Loki (Tom Hiddleston), gains access to the unlimited power of the energy cube called the Tesseract, Nick Fury (Samuel L. Jackson), director of S.H.I.E.L.D., initiates a superhero recruitment effort to defeat the unprecedented threat to Earth. Joining Fury's "dream team" are Iron Man (Robert Downey Jr.), Captain America (Chris Evans), the Hulk (Mark Ruffalo), Thor (Chris H

programme.title: Avengers: Age of Ultron
programme.desc: When Tony Stark (Robert Downey Jr.) jump-starts a dormant peacekeeping program, things go terribly awry, forcing him, Thor (Chris Hemsworth), the Incredible Hulk (Mark Ruffalo) and the rest of the Avengers to reassemble. As the fate of Earth hangs in the balance, the team is put to the ultimate test as they battle Ultron, a technological terror hell-bent on human extinction. Along the way, they en
